name: Eduardo Macaraeg
title: Co-Founder & CEO
bio: Former SVP at BDO Unibank with 18 years in HR technology. Started HRisPH after experiencing firsthand the pain of Philippine payroll compliance.

name: Clarissa Ocampo
title: Co-Founder & CTO
bio: Ex-Google engineer and Ateneo de Manila alumna. Built scalable systems for Southeast Asian markets. Passionate about making enterprise tech accessible to PH businesses.

name: Rommel Pascual
title: Chief Product Officer
bio: 15 years in HRIS product development. Previously led product at PayrollHero and Sprout Solutions. Deep expertise in Philippine labor compliance.

name: Maricel Santos
title: VP of Customer Success
bio: Certified SHRM professional with 12 years of HR practice in the Philippines. Led implementations at 200+ Philippine companies.

name: Arvin dela Cruz
title: Head of Compliance
bio: CPA and former BIR examiner. Ensures all our computations are always in sync with the latest SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG, and BIR circulars.

name: Patricia Lim
title: Head of Sales
bio: Former enterprise sales at SAP Philippines. Helped hundreds of Philippine companies modernize their HR operations.
